sourceTitle: Student AI Guidelines | UNSW College Current Students Website
evidenceSnippetOriginal: In May 2024, UNSW activated Microsoft Copilot with Commercial Data Protection for all staff and students with a zID. The protected version provides staff and students with a secure platform to ensure that sensitive information is securely stored and accessed only by authorised staff.
evidenceLocator: Section 'Appropriate Use of Generative AI' > Guideline 2 > Why Microsoft Copilot?
